visual_dna.facial_features: preserve identity consistently across all generated assets
visual_dna.body_proportions: maintain same body proportions and silhouette
visual_dna.hair: keep hairstyle consistent unless explicitly changed by story logic
visual_dna.accessories: preserve signature accessories across all views and scenes

style_profile.environment_hint: dense futuristic city, holograms, moody lighting

prompt_lock: maintain exact facial identity across all outputs
maintain consistent accessories and props unless changed intentionally
preserve the same character identity in 2D sprites and 3D reference outputs
negative_constraints: do not change hair color unless requested
do not replace outfit with a different archetype
do not introduce extra limbs or malformed hands
do not alter glasses or signature accessories
do not drift into a different art style mid-generation
